name: Bancontact Belgium National Payment API
what_it_does: Bancontact Belgium national payment REST API (via PSP gateway integration) for Belgian e-commerce merchants to accept Bancontact debit card payments from 15M+ Belgian bank account holders through Belgium's dominant national payment method covering 80%+ of Belgian e-commerce transactions, with both traditional card redirect (Bancontact) and mobile QR payment (Bancontact/Payconiq) modes supported through certified payment gateways. Enables AI agents to manage Bancontact checkout for Belgian debit payment automation, handle Bancontact/Payconiq QR for mobile Belgium payment automation, access payment confirmation for Belgian transaction verification automation, retrieve payment status for Bancontact monitoring automation, manage refund processing for Belgian payment reversal automation, handle redirect payment for Bancontact classic flow automation, access mobile payment for Payconiq app automation, retrieve webhook for payment event automation, manage recurring mandate for Belgian subscription payment automation, and integrate Bancontact via certified PSP gateways (Mollie, Stripe BE, Adyen, Worldline BE) for end-to-end Belgian payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting Bancontact debit payments from Belgian consumers for e-commerce checkout automation agents
Processing Bancontact QR mobile payments for Belgian retail POS automation agents
Integrating Bancontact into subscription billing for Belgian recurring payment automation agents
Receiving Bancontact webhooks for Belgian marketplace and service fulfillment automation agents
not_for: Non-Belgian markets (Bancontact is Belgium-only national payment method)
International cross-border payments (Bancontact is domestic Belgian EUR payment)
Direct Bancontact network integration (Bancontact only accessible via certified PSP gateways)
best_when: A Belgian e-commerce merchant or service wanting AI agents to accept payments from 15M+ Bancontact users through certified PSP gateways, accessing Belgium's 80%+ dominant national payment method.
avoid_when: BANCONTACT IS NOT A DIRECT API — PSP REQUIRED: Bancontact does not provide direct merchant API; automated direct Bancontact integration creates no endpoint; automated Bancontact acceptance requires certified PSP (Mollie, Stripe, Adyen, Worldline BE). REDIRECT FLOW IS REQUIRED: Bancontact checkout redirects consumer to bank's Bancontact page for PIN/app authorization; automated embedded card form assumption creates redirect-required error. BELGIAN MERCHANT REQUIRED: Bancontact merchant acceptance requires Belgian business entity; automated foreign entity Bancontact direct onboarding creates eligibility rejection. RECURRING MANDATE IS SEPARATE: Bancontact recurring payment (mandate) requires prior consumer consent; automated recurring charge without mandate creates mandate_not_found error.

auth.notes: Bancontact accessed via certified PSP gateways with gateway API key auth. REST API with JSON. Brussels, Belgium. Bancontact Payconiq Company established 1979 (as Bancontact) by Belgian banks. Merged with Payconiq International 2018. Products: Bancontact card payment, Bancontact/Payconiq mobile QR, Payconiq app, Bancontact recurring. Accessible through: Mollie, Stripe BE, Adyen, Worldline BE, Ingenico. NBB-regulated. 15M+ active users. Belgium's dominant payment method (80%+ e-commerce share). Competes with Visa/Mastercard debit for Belgian payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox via certified PSP (Mollie test, Stripe test) free; production requires Belgian merchant account
pricing.paid_tiers: Gateway-specific: Mollie €0.29 flat per Bancontact; Stripe 1.8% + €0.25; Adyen interchange++ model
pricing.notes: Brussels BE. Bancontact Payconiq Company. NBB regulated. Gateway-accessed. EUR. Flat/% per transaction.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per PSP gateway credentials; consumer bank authorization async; webhooks via gateway

known_agent_gotchas: CERTIFIED PSP REQUIRED — NO DIRECT BANCONTACT API: Bancontact network has no direct merchant API; automated direct Bancontact integration creates non-existent endpoint; automated acceptance requires certified PSP gateway (Mollie, Stripe BE, Adyen)

REDIRECT TO BANK IS REQUIRED: Bancontact checkout redirects to consumer's bank app or Bancontact page for authorization; automated inline form assumption creates redirect-required error; automated must implement full redirect flow

PAYCONIQ QR IS DIFFERENT FROM BANCONTACT CARD: Bancontact/Payconiq mobile QR and Bancontact card are different products accessed via same gateway; automated single-product assumption creates wrong flow for mobile vs card payment; automated must specify Bancontact or Payconiq flow

RECURRING MANDATE REQUIRES PRIOR CONSENT: Bancontact recurring payment requires consumer to establish mandate; automated recurring charge without mandate creates mandate_required error; automated subscription must complete mandate setup on first payment

CONSUMER AUTHORIZATION IS ASYNC: Bancontact authorization requires consumer bank app interaction; automated synchronous payment result assumption creates timeout; automated must await webhook from gateway for payment_completed event
agent_readiness.security_notes: Belgium national payment. NBB, PSD2, GDPR. PSP gateway API key. EU/BE. Bank account and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Belgium national debit payment. NBB, PSD2, GDPR. PSP gateway. EU/BE. Bank account data.
